name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Beat together margarine, oil, granulated sugar, powdered sugar, eggs and vanilla. Sift together flour, salt, baking soda and cream of tartar. Add dry ingredients to margarine mixture. Drop from a teaspoon onto greased cookie sheet. Bake until cookies are light brown around the edges, about 8 to 10 minutes (watch closely; if they get too brown, they will be dry).
